title: CI Doctor MQ Investigations Index
description: Canonical structure for the append-only aggregate index maintained by the CI Failure Doctor (Merge Queue) workflow at /tmp/gh-aw/repo-memory/default/mq/investigations/index.json. This file references every investigation record ever written; it MUST only ever grow via read-modify-write and must never be recreated from scratch or overwritten in a way that drops previously recorded entries.

schema_version.description: Version of this index schema. Always "1.0".

total.description: Number of elements in the entries array. Must equal entries.length and must never decrease between consecutive writes.

entries.description: Append-only list of investigation summaries, one per recorded investigation. New entries are appended; existing entries are never removed or reordered destructively.

investigations.description: Deprecated legacy alias for entries kept only for backward compatibility with historical index files. New writes MUST use entries and MUST NOT drop any element previously present here.

investigation_id.description: Filesystem-safe identifier of the investigation record file (without extension): <YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM-SS-sss>-<run-id>. May be an empty string only for legacy entries migrated from older index files.

id.description: Deprecated legacy alias for investigation_id present in some historical entries.

run_id.description: GitHub Actions run ID of the failed merge-queue workflow, encoded as a string. Must always be a non-empty string (never a bare JSON number).

run_url.description: URL of the failed GitHub Actions workflow run.

workflow_name.description: Name of the failed workflow (e.g., "Linux (Ubuntu 22.04, Python 3.11)").

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC time the investigation was produced (e.g., 2026-05-12T14:30:00Z). May be an empty string only for legacy entries migrated from older index files.

title.description: Short, searchable failure description. May be an empty string only for legacy entries migrated from older index files.

category.description: Failure category. Must be one of the seven canonical categories.

signature_hash.description: Hash of the failure signature; matches the pattern file name <signature-hash>.json. May be an empty string only for legacy entries migrated from older index files.

pr_number.description: Affected merge-queue PR number encoded as a string, or null when no PR can be identified. Prefer a string; a bare JSON number is tolerated only in legacy entries.
